identity.name: Pink Lantern
identity.mission: To create a discreet, elegant, and premium marketplace for adult services, prioritizing user privacy and sophisticated aesthetics.

typography.instructions: Use Playfair Display for all H1-H3 headings to establish the premium brand voice. Use Manrope for all functional text, inputs, and long-form reading. Use JetBrains Mono sparingly for ID numbers or technical data.

usage_rules.gradients: Do NOT use full-screen gradients. Use subtle radial gradients for spotlights (e.g., behind a hero image).
usage_rules.borders: Use 1px borders with very low opacity (e.g., border-primary-gold/20) to define edges without clutter.
usage_rules.glassmorphism: Use extensively for cards and overlays: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/5.

textures.noise: Use a noise overlay on the main background to reduce digital banding.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#E5C158] transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37]/30 text-[#D4AF37] hover:border-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full

cards.listing: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl bg-[#0F0F0F] border border-white/5 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/30 transition-all duration-500
cards.feature: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#1A1A1A] to-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 p-8 rounded-2xl

inputs.default: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-[#D4AF37]/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37]/50 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 transition-all duration-300 rounded-lg h-12

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12
navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-[#0F0F0F] border-t border-white/10 p-4 flex justify-around md:hidden z-50

grid_system.homepage_feed: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 md:gap-8

animations.parallax: Use Framer Motion for scroll-linked parallax effects on hero images.

hero.description: Abstract gold wave on black background - Use for Hero Section parallax background or overlay.

client_avatar.description: Man about to drink from wineglass - Use for Client Profile Placeholder.

escort_avatar.description: Woman in black coat looking away - Use for Escort Profile Placeholder or Listing Card.

background_texture.description: Street lights at night - Use for subtle background textures or modal backdrops.

accent_element.description: Pink and white flowers in vase - Use for decorative accent in 'Premium' sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use icons sparingly and elegantly (thin stroke).
Install 'framer-motion' for smooth entrance animations. Every page transition must be smooth.
The Age Gate must be a full-screen overlay with a high z-index (z-[100]). Use the 'hero' image as a blurred background for this.
For the Listing Cards: Image takes 70% of height. Info is minimal at bottom. Use a gradient overlay (black/0 to black/90) at the bottom of the image to make text readable.
Dashboard: Do NOT use standard tables. Use 'List Rows' or 'Grid Cards' for mobile responsiveness. Only use Tables for high-density data on Desktop.
Language Switcher: Place in the top right of the Header. Use ISO codes (EN | FR | ZH) styled as small, clickable text.
Implement a 'Favorites' heart icon on every listing card that toggles state instantly with a micro-interaction (scale up/down).
Admin Panel: Can be simpler/cleaner but must maintain Dark Mode consistency. Don't switch to Light Mode for Admin.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
